hero.title: WELCOME TO THE HOUSTON LEARNING CENTER

rules: Follow posted 10 mph speed limit on campus.
PPE must be worn at all times in lab and bay areas.
Photography is not permitted without authorization.

safety_features.title: GE VERNOVA EHS COMMITMENT
safety_features.policy_summary: We safeguard people, communities, and the environment by identifying risks and starting work only when it is safe.
